name: Phase 3 CRM intake and opportunity-to-project requirements matrix

evidence: packages/crm-core/src/index.ts implements tenant-owned Account, Contact, OpportunityStage, Opportunity, MoneyAmount, scope hints, custom-field metadata refs, manual source, tenant mismatch guards, stable system key validation, ISO date/date-window validation, probability validation, duplicate-contact rejection, active-stage validation, runtime array/object guards, and defensive copies

packages/crm-core/src/intakePrimitives.test.ts covers tenant-owned primitive creation without Bitrix/AmoCRM coupling, cross-tenant reference rejection without leaking referenced details, stable key/date/probability validation, defensive copies, malformed runtime arrays/metadata, and missing or unvalidated stage refs
tests: npm test -- packages/crm-core/src/intakePrimitives.test.ts first exit 1 with createAccount/createOpportunityStage not implemented
Bug Hunt regression: npm test -- packages/crm-core/src/intakePrimitives.test.ts exit 1 because malformed contacts crashed with TypeError before runtime array guard

Code review regression: npm test -- packages/crm-core/src/intakePrimitives.test.ts exit 1 because missing stage crashed with TypeError before runtime object guard

Second review regression: npm test -- packages/crm-core/src/intakePrimitives.test.ts exit 1 because malformed truthy stage.active was accepted before strict boolean validation
Second review fix verification: npm test -- packages/crm-core/src/intakePrimitives.test.ts exit 0 (5 passed)

npm test first exit 1 because apps/web/src/App.test.tsx label update did not find expected text; targeted rerun of apps/web/src/App.test.tsx exit 0 (12 passed), full rerun exit 0 (14 files, 80 tests), final rerun after review fixes exit 0 (14 files, 81 tests)
npm run test:e2e:phase -- --phase=3 first exit 1 in sandbox because test-results/.last-run.json unlink was not permitted; escalated rerun exit 1 because e2e/tests/phase3 has no tests yet
rows.cleanup: No runtime resources were created. npm install --package-lock-only --ignore-scripts updated package-lock only for the new workspace dependency. Test-results write failure was sandbox-local; escalated E2E blocker check completed without creating Phase 3 test artifacts.
rows.blocker: Domain primitive implementation evidence is complete, but this row still cannot be marked verified because required E2E-020 structured evidence does not exist until Phase 3 API/web E2E rows create e2e/tests/phase3/opportunity-create.spec.ts.

evidence: packages/crm-core/src/index.ts implements evaluateOpportunityReadiness with deterministic blocker order, stable blocker codes, Russian safe messages, fieldRefs, trace, stable category/typology system-key checks, and nextAction selection for missing data, missing template match, low confidence, and ready-for-feasibility states

packages/crm-core/src/readiness.test.ts covers complete ready intake, incomplete intake blockers, intentionally unknown account/contact intent, low-confidence template match routing, empty template ids, and tenant-label category/typology rejection

Bug Hunt found and fixed two important edge cases: empty template id no longer throws, and tenant-label category/typology values no longer pass as stable keys; external Requesting Code Review returned no Critical/Important findings

rows.blocker: Readiness domain implementation evidence is complete, but this row cannot be marked verified because required E2E-021 structured evidence does not exist until Phase 3 API/web E2E rows create e2e/tests/phase3/intake-readiness.spec.ts.

evidence: packages/tenant-config/src/index.ts defines tenant-owned OpportunityCategoryDefinition, OpportunityTypologyDefinition, OpportunityIntakeTemplate, OpportunityIntakeMetadataRegistry, and OpportunityIntakeRequirements with stable system keys, active flags, versioning, labels, and deterministic trace output

createOpportunityIntakeMetadataRegistry validates tenant ownership, duplicate category/typology/custom-field/template keys, opportunity-only custom-field targets, known category/typology references, active custom-field requirements, and finite Phase 3 standard intake field keys
resolveOpportunityIntakeRequirements returns category/typology labels and required standard/custom intake fields from tenant configuration/templates, not from crm-core hardcoded company terms
Bug Hunt found and fixed ambiguous active template pairs plus active templates referencing inactive category/typology metadata; external Requesting Code Review returned no Critical/Important findings

packages/project-core/package.json, packages/crm-core/package.json, and package-lock.json record workspace dependencies for project-core/domain-core and crm-core/project-core
